title: KnowledgeNode
description: A single unit of knowledge in the Kode Brain system.

id.description: Stable, URL-safe identifier. Format: domain/slug or domain/sub/slug. Never change after first use — edges reference this.

name.description: Human-readable name. Capabilities should be verb phrases.

summary.description: One- or two-sentence explanation of what this is.

project.description: Project slug this node belongs to.

domain.description: Domain slug this node belongs to. Empty for project-level nodes.

sourceFiles.description: Source file paths (relative to project root) that support this node.

sourceSymbols.description: Specific exported symbols (functions, classes, constants) that support this node.

pagePath.description: Relative path to the Markdown knowledge page for this node, within docs/brain/.

tags.description: Optional free-form tags for search and filtering.

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 date when this node was last updated by any agent or human.

lastReviewed.description: ISO 8601 date when a human last reviewed and confirmed this node.

examples.name: User login flow
examples.summary: The runtime path from a login POST request through credential validation, session creation, and response.
